title: Listening inference
subtitle: Understand attitude from voice and context.
duolingoBridge: Growth bridges B1 output into B2 preparation through native-style input, longer reasoning, nuance, synthesis, register control, and autonomous correction.
overview: Knowledge point 1: infer certainty, doubt, or emotion.
Knowledge point 2: support inference with clues.

items.fr: À sa voix, on sent qu’il n’est pas complètement sûr.
items.en: From his voice, one feels that he is not completely sure.
items.es: Por su voz, se siente que no está completamente seguro.

items.fr: Il semble hésiter avant de répondre.
items.en: He seems to hesitate before answering.

items.fr: Elle, au contraire, paraît convaincue par son argument.
items.en: She, on the contrary, seems convinced by her argument.
items.es: Ella, al contrario, parece convencida por su argumento.

items.fr: Un indice important est la manière dont elle insiste sur certains mots.
items.en: An important clue is the way she emphasizes certain words.
items.es: Una pista importante es la manera en que insiste en ciertas palabras.

items.fr: Comprendre l’attitude aide à comprendre le vrai message.
items.en: Understanding attitude helps understand the real message.
items.es: Entender la actitud ayuda a entender el verdadero mensaje.
